title: payer Sent state missing from retransmit_in_flight_payments
description: retransmit_in_flight_payments() resends pending PaymentActions on reconnect, but skips payer sessions in Sent state. Trigger: payer broadcasts tx, transitions to Sent, persists to DB, then send_payment_message() fails (channel closed mid-send or disconnect). On reconnect the payer resumes in Sent state; retransmit has no arm for (Payer, Sent), so the PaymentAction::Sent message is never re-broadcast to the payee. Payee waits in AddressProvided indefinitely with no feedback, session times out 24 h later. The payer has a confirmed tx hash but no payee acknowledgment. Recovery requires manual session inspection.
close_reason: false positive: (Payer, Sent) arm already exists in resync_sessions() at line 1546-1557; subagent invented a function name that doesn't exist
